languages.text: {n}Обложка книги покрыта толстым слоем пыли. Пухлый срез страниц деформирован и тронут тлением. Рядом в беспорядке разбросаны письменные принадлежности — автоперо, прихотливой формы чернильница, пресс-папье, — будто автор журнала, сделав последнюю запись, покинул свой тайный кабинет в спешке.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Обложка книги покрыта толстым слоем пыли. Пухлый срез страниц деформирован и тронут тлением. Рядом в беспорядке разбросаны письменные принадлежности — автоперо, прихотливой формы чернильница, пресс-папье, — будто автор журнала, сделав последнюю запись, покинул свой тайный кабинет в спешке.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The cover of the book is coated in a thick layer of dust. The sprayed edges have warped and are marred with decay. Writing implements lie in disarray — an autoquill, an ornately shaped inkwell, and a paperweight — as if the diarist had made the last entry before leaving their secret study in haste.{/n}

{n}The cover of the book is coated in a thick layer of dust. The sprayed edges have warped and are marred with decay. Writing implements lie in disarray — an autoquill, an ornately shaped inkwell, and a paperweight — as if the diarist had made the last entry before leaving their secret study in haste.{/n}

languages.text: {n}书本的封面覆着厚厚一层灰尘。喷色的书边已经翘起，被腐蚀得残破不堪。书写工具散乱地摆着——一支自动羽毛笔、一个造型华丽的墨水瓶、还有一枚镇纸——仿佛日记主人在匆忙写下最后一篇记录后，仓促离开了这间秘密书房。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cover of the book is coated in a thick layer of dust. The sprayed edges have warped and are marred with decay. Writing implements lie in disarray — an autoquill, an ornately shaped inkwell, and a paperweight — as if the diarist had made the last entry before leaving their secret study in haste.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}书本的封面覆着厚厚一层灰尘。喷色的书边已经翘起，被腐蚀得残破不堪。书写工具散乱地摆着——一支自动羽毛笔、一个造型华丽的墨水瓶、还有一枚镇纸——仿佛日记主人在匆忙写下最后一篇记录后，仓促离开了这间秘密书房。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La tapa del libro está cubierta de una densa capa de polvo. Los bordees, rociados, están deformados y marcados por la descomposición. Ves varios útiles de escritura desordenados. Una pluma automática, un tintero decorado y un pisapapeles. Es como si el autor hubiera terminado la última entrada con prisa antes de abandonar su estudio secreto.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cover of the book is coated in a thick layer of dust. The sprayed edges have warped and are marred with decay. Writing implements lie in disarray — an autoquill, an ornately shaped inkwell, and a paperweight — as if the diarist had made the last entry before leaving their secret study in haste.{/n}

Es como si el autor hubiera terminado la última entrada con prisa antes de abandonar su estudio secreto.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le livre est couvert d'une épaisse couche de poussière. Les bordures sont racornies et abîmées par la moisissure. Les instruments d'écriture, une autoplume, un encrier orné et un presse-papier, gisent en désordre, comme si l'auteur avait rédigé sa dernière entrée avant de quitter son bureau secret dans la plus grande précipitation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cover of the book is coated in a thick layer of dust. The sprayed edges have warped and are marred with decay. Writing implements lie in disarray — an autoquill, an ornately shaped inkwell, and a paperweight — as if the diarist had made the last entry before leaving their secret study in haste.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kitabın kapağı, kalın bir toz tabakasıyla kaplı. Boyalı kenarları bükülmüş ve çürümeyle bozulmuş. Bir otoyazar, süslü bir hokka ve bir kâğıt ağırlığından oluşan yazı gereçleri darmadağın duruyor. Sanki günlük sahibi, gizli çalışma odasını aceleyle terk etmeden önce son bir girdi girmiş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cover of the book is coated in a thick layer of dust. The sprayed edges have warped and are marred with decay. Writing implements lie in disarray — an autoquill, an ornately shaped inkwell, and a paperweight — as if the diarist had made the last entry before leaving their secret study in haste.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Einband des Buchs ist mit einer dicken Staubschicht bedeckt. Die Seiten sind porös und vom Alter gezeichnet. Du siehst verschiedene Schreibutensilien — eine Autofeder, ein verziertes Tintenfass und einen Briefbeschwerer — als hätte der Verfasser des Tagebuchs sein geheimes Arbeitszimmer nach dem letzten Eintrag hastig verlassen.{/n}

Writing implements lie in disarray — an autoquill, an ornately shaped inkwell, and a paperweight — as if the diarist had made the last entry before leaving their secret study in haste.{/n}

languages.text: {n}本棚のカバーは厚い埃で覆われ、噴霧された縁は歪み腐敗している。自動ペン、装飾的な形のインク入れ、重しは乱雑に置かれている。日記帳の最後の書き込みは、秘密の書斎を急いで出て行く前に書かれたものらしい。{/n}
